CONTROL_ITERATION_MISSED.description: At least one control iteration was missed

DC_BUS_UNDER_VOLTAGE.description: The DC voltage fell below the configured limit

DC_BUS_OVER_VOLTAGE.description: The DC voltage exceeded the configured limit

DC_BUS_OVER_REGEN_CURRENT.description: Current flowing back into the power supply exceeded limit

DC_BUS_OVER_CURRENT.description: Too much current was pulled from the power supply

IDLE.description: Disable motor PWM and do nothing

FULL_CALIBRATION_SEQUENCE.description: Run motor calibration and then encoder offset calibration

MOTOR_CALIBRATION.description: Measure phase resistance and phase inductance of the motor

ENCODER_INDEX_SEARCH.description: Turn the motor until the encoder index is traversed

ENCODER_OFFSET_CALIBRATION.description: Measure the offset between encoder position and electrical phase

POSITION_CONTROL.description: All control loops: torque, velocity, and position

TUNING.description: Tuning mode with sine wave generation

UART_B.description: UART B mode (not supported on v3.x)

UART_C.description: UART C mode (not supported on v3.x)

get_adc_voltage.name: get_adc_voltage
get_adc_voltage.description: Reads the ADC voltage of the specified GPIO

save_configuration.name: save_configuration
save_configuration.description: Saves the current configuration to non-volatile memory and reboots

erase_configuration.name: erase_configuration
erase_configuration.description: Resets all config variables to default values and reboots

reboot.name: reboot
reboot.description: Reboots the controller without saving configuration

clear_errors.name: clear_errors
clear_errors.description: Clear all errors of this device including submodules

get_dma_status.name: get_dma_status
get_dma_status.description: Returns information about specified DMA stream

get_gpio_states.name: get_gpio_states
get_gpio_states.description: Returns logic states of all GPIOs (bitfield)

get_drv_fault.name: get_drv_fault
get_drv_fault.description: Returns last gate driver fault code

watchdog_feed.name: watchdog_feed
watchdog_feed.description: Feed the watchdog to prevent timeouts

move_incremental.name: move_incremental

parameters.name: from_input_pos
parameters.description: If true, increment relative to input_pos

move_incremental.description: Moves the axis goal point by a specified increment

set_linear_count.name: set_linear_count
set_linear_count.description: Set the current linear position of the axis

engage.name: engage
engage.description: Engage the mechanical brake if present and enabled

release.name: release
release.description: Release the mechanical brake if present and enabled

vbus_voltage.name: vbus_voltage
vbus_voltage.description: Voltage on the DC bus as measured by the ODrive

ibus.name: ibus
ibus.description: Current on the DC bus (positive=consuming, negative=sourcing)

serial_number.name: serial_number
serial_number.description: Unique serial number of the device

ibus_report_filter_k.name: ibus_report_filter_k
ibus_report_filter_k.description: Filter gain for reported ibus (1.0 disables)

task_timers_armed.name: task_timers_armed
task_timers_armed.description: Trigger single control loop timing sample

brake_resistance.name: brake_resistance
brake_resistance.description: Value of the brake resistor in ohms

dc_max_positive_current.name: dc_max_positive_current
dc_max_positive_current.description: Max current the power supply can source

dc_max_negative_current.name: dc_max_negative_current
dc_max_negative_current.description: Max current the power supply can sink

max_regen_current.name: max_regen_current
max_regen_current.description: Bus current allowed before brake shunts

is_homed.name: is_homed
is_homed.description: Whether the axis has been successfully homed

steps.name: steps
steps.description: Current commanded position in steps (step_dir mode)

startup_encoder_index_search.name: startup_encoder_index_search
startup_encoder_index_search.description: Run encoder index search after startup

startup_encoder_offset_calibration.name: startup_encoder_offset_calibration
startup_encoder_offset_calibration.description: Run encoder offset calibration after startup

startup_closed_loop_control.name: startup_closed_loop_control
startup_closed_loop_control.description: Enable closed loop control after calibration

index_found.name: index_found
index_found.description: Whether the encoder index has been found

count_in_cpr.name: count_in_cpr
count_in_cpr.description: Count value in counts per revolution

delta_pos_cpr_counts.name: delta_pos_cpr_counts
delta_pos_cpr_counts.description: Delta position in counts per revolution
